creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Why did you need to add compiler:c++11-lang when they both compile fine as-is? Eventually compiler:c++11-lang will be retired anyways, because this will be the default. I don't think there is the need to be proactive with this.

I agree, STRIP option should be retired not only here, but on all ports.

I didn't make these ports, only updated them to the latest versions when they came up.

Patch looks good to me.
